title: Neon Elastic Rubber Bands 100G’s, Approximately 250pcs, Neon Coloured, Ideal for Home and Office Supplies Industrial Crafts, Organisation, Natural Rubber Bands Strong and Durable
features: ➰💪📝✅ 250 RUBBER BANDS – With around 250 NEON rubber bands per pack, you'll have plenty for all your organising, crafting, and DIY needs!
➰💪📝✅ VERSATILE USAGE – Fantastic for office organisation, home storage, crafts, DIY projects, and industrial purposes, these rubber bands meet a wide variety of needs
➰💪📝✅ VIBRANT NEON COLOURS – Bright and eye-catching neon colours make these rubber bands easy to locate, adding a fun twist to any admin task
➰💪📝✅ STRONG AND FLEXIBLE – Designed to securely hold items in place without breaking or losing their stretch, they’re ideal for everyday tasks that require reliability and flexibility

➰💪📝✅ INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - In each package, you will receive a pack of approximately 250 elastic bands. Each pack contains a variety of differently sized bands suitable for use in home, office and much more
description: These bands are designed for strength and durability, offering reliable elasticity for various applications. Their bright neon colours add a fun and practical touch, making them easy to spot whether you're organising office supplies, crafting, or completing DIY projects. Ideal for both home and industrial use, these versatile rubber bands are strong enough to hold items securely yet flexible enough for repeated use. Whether you're bundling papers, wrapping cords, or using them in creative crafts, these rubber bands are a must-have for anyone who values functionality and organisation.
